name: leakage-controlled-benchmark-multi-source-stock-prediction
description: Protocol-locked benchmark for multi-source next-day stock prediction: availability-timed derived feature datasets for five source families (price technical indicators, news sentiment statistics, social media day-level aggregates, publication-lagged macroeconomic series, public sector graphs) over 55 liquid US large-caps, feature rows 2016-01-04 to 2023-12-28 (prices from 2015-01-02 warm up the indicators), with five expanding chronological folds, a tuned price-only reference baseline, naive/classical anchors, and reference results from 2,468 runs (2,151 controlled). Raw third-party text and proprietary classifications are not redistributed (see DATA-STATEMENTS.md). The derived-feature deposit is committed in the repository under data/processed/ (per-file SHA-256 in MANIFEST.sha256) and is additionally DOI-archived on Zenodo (10.5281/zenodo.21431362).
citeAs: Mouadh Ltifi, Francesco Puoti, Fabrizio Pittorino. An Evaluation Protocol and Benchmark for Multi-Source Stock Prediction. 2026. https://github.com/mouadhltifi/leakage-controlled-benchmark

distribution.name: price-table
distribution.description: Per-stock-day price/technical table: OHLCV, returns (1/5/20d), 10 trailing indicators and rolling-normalized variants; 124,520 rows x 55 tickers, 2015-01-02 to 2023-12-29.

distribution.name: news-table
distribution.description: Per-stock-day FinBERT news-sentiment statistics (T-1 close-to-close aligned), 93,485 rows; 53/55 tickers have >=1 tagged article (HON, RTX uncovered).

distribution.name: social-table
distribution.description: Per-stock-day StockTwits aggregates (T-1 aligned), 114,747 rows x 55 tickers; coverage ends 2022-12-30 and the 2023 gap is explicit.

distribution.name: macro-table
distribution.description: Business-day macro table: five federal series with normalized variants + FOMC-window flag, 2,347 days, 2015-01-01 to 2023-12-29.

distribution.name: results
distribution.description: Committed reference results (CSV): direction/volatility grids, leakage-free macro re-runs, harness-native single-state reference cells, sector-graph equivalence arms, naive anchors, audit diagnostics.

distribution.name: macro-raw
distribution.description: Public-domain FRED federal series (business-day resampled, original and publication-lag-corrected) + FOMC dates.

distribution.name: derived-features
distribution.description: Per-stock-day derived feature tables for the five source families, committed under data/processed/features/ (licensing-clean derived layer; per-source terms in DATA-STATEMENTS.md).

distribution.name: graphs
distribution.description: Inter-stock graph structure: FF12 sector adjacency and rolling-correlation dynamic graphs (data/processed/graphs/).

distribution.name: assembled-datasets
distribution.description: Model-ready assembled datasets joining the family tables on the frozen universe, window, and folds (main + encoder/pooling variants). Assembly semantics: ~111k per-stock-day rows (55 tickers x 2,011 feature days, 2016-01-04 to 2023-12-28; prices fetched from 2015-01-02 warm up the trailing indicators); primary label = next-day direction under a symmetric 0.5% dead-zone applied to train/validation/test alike; secondary label = next-day realized volatility; five expanding chronological folds with July-to-June test windows from 2019-07-01 to 2023-12-31 (the last a six-month stub).

recordSet.name: price-days
recordSet.description: One row per (ticker, business day): the price/technical family. Full column schema in DATASHEET.md.

field.name: close
field.description: raw close used for labels and anchors

recordSet.name: news-days
recordSet.description: One row per (ticker, business day) with >=1 FNSPID-tagged article: FinBERT sentiment statistics, availability-timed T-1. 53/55 tickers covered (HON, RTX have none).

recordSet.name: social-days
recordSet.description: One row per (ticker, business day): StockTwits day-level aggregates, availability-timed T-1; coverage ends 2022-12-30.

recordSet.name: macro-days
recordSet.description: One row per business day: five federal series (original and normalized) + FOMC-window flag; the availability-timed (publication-lagged) variant ships in data/raw/macro/.
